LAW AND MOTION 301, CROSS-DEFENDANT CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH THAT CITIBANK ITSELF ENGAGED IN ACTIONABLE MISCONDUCT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION #1 AND THAT PLAINTIFF STANDING TO ASSERT SOME CLAIM THAT IS NOT PRE-EMPTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTIONS 2 THROUGH 4. PLAINTIFF'S 38 PAGE BRIEF FILED IN VIOLATION OF CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1113 (D) WITHOUT PERMISSION REQUIRED BY CRC 3.1113(E) WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED. SEE CRC 3.1113(G) AND 3.1300. THE COURT, HOWEVER WOULD HAVE REACHED THE SAME RESULT EVEN IF IT HAD CONSIDERED THAT BRIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CROSS DEFENDANT RESURGENCE FINANCIAL, LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND ON GROUNDS OF PERVASIVE UNCERTAINTY AND FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO ALLEGE, IF SHE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, FACTS OUTSIDE THE CONDUCT OF LITIGATION BUT WITHIN THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATION THAT ARE SUFFICIENT TO PLEAD THE ELEMENTS OF CROSS COMPLAINANTS CAUSES OF ACTION AND THAT PLEAD INJURY COMPENSIBLE THROUGH THAT CAUSE OF ACTION. calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Nathan A. Searles, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Resurgence Financial, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Mary A. Laks.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed July 9, 2009.
Order sustaining the demurrer without leave to amend defendant's cross-complaint was filed on March 5, 2009.
Declaration of Dominique R. Feteau in Lieu fo Live Testimony Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 98 was filed today, October 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 19, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Resurgence Financial, LLC, and against defendant Mary A. Laks as follows:

Principal - $12,261.89.
Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived, for a total judgment in the amount of $12,261.89.

Furthermore, defendant & cross-complainant Mary A. Laks' cross-complaint is DISMISSED without prejudice.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Assigned To Trial Court
